note: Native 1m EA LiDAR sections per fort

sites.garrison: Cohors II Nerviorum (late 2C) -> Cohors IV Lingonum (3-4C)
sites.survives: Most fully excavated Wall fort; outlines on site, reconstructed bath-house, 35m viewing tower
sites.desc: Built c.122-127 AD as the eastern terminus guarding the Tyne; the most-excavated Wall fort, interpreted from a tower.

_note: Trimmed to Segedunum only for the standalone product (full manifest lives in wall-interactive).
